zh.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers出生在法國諾門迪。他於大約1073年與Asceline FitzAndre在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1156年之後在英國藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers出生在法国諾門迪。他于大约1073年与Asceline FitzAndre在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1156年之后在英国藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Villiers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Villars
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri.

French: habitational name from any of various places called Villars, from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’, a derivative of Latin villa ‘country house, estate’ (later used of a group of houses forming a settlement).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers was born in Normandy, France. He married Asceline FitzAndre about 1073, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1156, in Warrington, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers est né à Normandie, France. Il a épousé Asceline FitzAndre environ 1073, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1156, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers wurde in Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Er hat um 1073 in Lancashire, England Asceline FitzAndre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1156 in Warrington, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers è nato il nel Normandie, Francia. Lui sposato Asceline FitzAndre circa 1073, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1156, nel Warrington, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiersはフランスノーマンディで生まれた。約1073年にイギリスランカシュアイアでAsceline FitzAndreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1156年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers(은)는 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1073년 영국 랭카실르에서 Asceline FitzAndre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 이후 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers nasceu em Normandie, França. Ele casou-se com Asceline FitzAndre aproximadamente 1073, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1156, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers родился в местности норманди, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Asceline FitzAndre около 1073 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1156 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Paganus de Villiers nació en Normandie, Francia. Se casó con Asceline FitzAndre aproximadamente 1073, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1156, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
